submenu.label: Patch
submenu.command: !npm version patch && git push && git push --tags

submenu.label: Minor
submenu.command: !npm version minor && git push && git push --tags

submenu.label: Major
submenu.command: !npm version major && git push && git push --tags

label: Open Repo
command: URL=$(gh repo view --json url -q .url) && PANE=$(cmux --json list-panes | jq -r --arg sid "$CMUX_HUB_BROWSER_SURFACE_ID" '.panes[] | select(.surface_refs[] == $sid) | .ref') && cmux new-surface --type browser --pane "$PANE" --url "$URL"
